releases.description:
버전 업데이트 및 오류를 해결하였습니다.

## What's Changed
* feat: use direct YES24 API endpoint for book search by @GoBeromsu in https://github.com/kmsk99/kr-book-info-plugin/pull/15
* 버전 업데이트 및 오류 해결 by @kmsk99 in https://github.com/kmsk99/kr-book-info-plugin/pull/16

## New Contributors

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kmsk99/kr-book-info-plugin/compare/1.3.3...1.4.0
